name: har-monorepo
description: Hybrid AI Router (HAR) - A modular monorepo for intelligent AI prompt routing.

scripts.demo: node apps/cli/dist/index.js "Rewrite this sentence to be more professional: 'hey i want to ask if u can help me'" && node apps/cli/dist/index.js "Explain the architecture of a real-time chat system using WebSockets" --verbose && node apps/cli/dist/index.js "Analyze this messy note and summarize: 'meeting today at 5, talk about the new api, make sure to bring coffee, john said he might be late, dont forget to check the logs'" --verbose
